title: Crafting a Buyer Persona for a Wellness Center
scenario: Develop a persona description (json) for a wellness center targeting individuals seeking holistic health solutions. The description should include demographics, health goals, preferred wellness practices, and social media habits. The persona should be tailored to a specific wellness center brand and should highlight the persona's willingness to invest in wellness services.
constraints: Must include at least three key health goals related to holistic wellness
Must highlight the persona's preferred wellness practices (e.g. meditation, yoga, nutrition)

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt ensure a thorough and detailed persona description?
Does the prompt adhere to the given constraints?
Does the prompt maintain an objective tone and avoid biases?
